_comment: MIL FINDINGS -- THE ONLY EXIT POINT. This file is the sole data crossing from MIL to CJI Pulse. Nothing else crosses the boundary.
_zero_entanglement: mil/outputs/mil_findings.json is the only file CJI Pulse may read from mil/. No other mil/ file may be imported or read by external systems.

summary.delta_tel_note: delta_tel=0.0 for all findings -- no internal telemetry. Phase 2 required to close Vane gap.
